name: All Other Miscellaneous Fabricated Metal Product Manufacturing
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Near-net-shape profiles for machine slideways, clamping sections, wear strips, jig/fixture bases, and structural brackets. Profile-intensive segment estimated USD 4-6B (2025). Highest differentiation in hardened flat slideway segment (40% of linear guidance) where pre-hardened delivery eliminates OEM hardening step entirely.
entryStrategy: Existing market — target heavy-duty machine tool builders and special-purpose machine OEMs where IH slideway profiles eliminate L6c (Surface Treatment & Hardening) at the OEM.
